<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Arnold's Mulch | Mulch &amp; Landscaping Services in Muncie, IN</title>
<meta name="description" content="Arnold's Mulch provides professional mulch delivery, mulch installation, landscape bed design, and property maintenance in Muncie, Indiana and Delaware County. Call (765) 749-2256 for a free quote.">
<meta name="keywords" content="Mulch Muncie IN, Landscaping Muncie IN, Mulch Delivery Muncie, Landscape Services Muncie Indiana, Mulch Installation Muncie">
<link rel="icon" type="image/jpeg" href="data:image/jpeg;base64,">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:opsz,wght@9..144,400;9..144,600;9..144,700;9..144,900&family=Karla:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --forest:#2e3b24;
    --forest-dark:#1f2917;
    --bark:#5c4129;
    --bark-light:#80573a;
    --tan:#e8dcc2;
    --cream:#faf6ec;
    --gold:#d6903c;
    --text:#2b2620;
    --muted:#6e6657;
    --radius:10px;
  }
  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    font-family:'Karla',Arial,sans-serif;
    color:var(--text);
    background:var(--cream);
    line-height:1.6;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  h1,h2,h3,h4{
    font-family:'Fraunces',Georgia,serif;
    line-height:1.15;
    color:var(--forest-dark);
    letter-spacing:.2px;
  }
  img{max-width:100%;display:block;}
  a{color:inherit;}
  .container{
    max-width:1180px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:0 20px;
  }
  /* ===== Header ===== */
  header.site-header{
    position:sticky;
    top:0;
    z-index:1000;
    background:var(--cream);
    border-bottom:3px solid var(--bark);
    box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
  }
  .nav-wrap{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    padding:10px 20px;
    max-width:1180px;
    margin:0 auto;
  }
  .brand{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:12px;
    text-decoration:none;
  }
  .brand img{
    width:54px;
    height:54px;
    border-radius:50%;
    object-fit:cover;
    border:2px solid var(--bark);
  }
  .brand-text{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:1.3rem;
    color:var(--forest-dark);
    line-height:1.05;
  }
  .brand-text span{
    display:block;
    font-family:'Karla',sans-serif;
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:.65rem;
    letter-spacing:2px;
    color:var(--gold);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    margin-top:3px;
  }
  nav.main-nav{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:28px;
  }
  nav.main-nav a{
    text-decoration:none;
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:.95rem;
    color:var(--forest-dark);
    position:relative;
    padding:6px 0;
  }
  nav.main-nav a:hover{color:var(--gold);}
  .nav-call{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    background:var(--forest);
    color:#fff !important;
    padding:10px 18px;
    border-radius:6px;
    font-weight:700;
    text-decoration:none;
    white-space:nowrap;
    transition:background .2s ease;
  }
  .nav-call:hover{background:var(--gold);}
  .menu-toggle{
    display:none;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:5px;
    background:none;
    border:none;
    cursor:pointer;
    padding:6px;
  }
  .menu-toggle span{
    width:26px;
    height:3px;
    background:var(--forest-dark);
    border-radius:2px;
  }
  /* ===== Hero ===== */
  .hero{
    position:relative;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(31,41,23,.78), rgba(31,41,23,.55) 55%, rgba(31,41,23,.85)),
      url("data:image/jpeg;base64,") center 65%/cover no-repeat;
    color:#fff;
    padding:90px 20px 110px;
    text-align:center;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow{
    display:inline-block;
    font-size:.78rem;
    font-weight:700;
    letter-spacing:3px;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--gold);
    background:rgba(0,0,0,.25);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);
    padding:7px 16px;
    border-radius:30px;
    margin-bottom:22px;
  }
  .hero h1{
    color:#fff;
    font-size:2.4rem;
    font-weight:700;
    max-width:760px;
    margin:0 auto 18px;
  }
  .hero p.lead{
    max-width:560px;
    margin:0 auto 32px;
    font-size:1.08rem;
    color:#f1ece1;
  }
  .hero-buttons{
    display:flex;
    gap:16px;
    justify-content:center;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .btn{
    display:inline-block;
    padding:15px 30px;
    border-radius:6px;
    font-weight:700;
    text-decoration:none;
    font-size:1rem;
    border:2px solid transparent;
    transition:transform .15s ease, background .2s ease, color .2s ease;
  }
  .btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);}
  .btn-primary{background:var(--gold);color:#2b2008;}
  .btn-primary:hover{background:#c47b29;}
  .btn-outline{background:transparent;color:#fff;border-color:#fff;}
  .btn-outline:hover{background:#fff;color:var(--forest-dark);}
  /* mulch edge divider */
  .mulch-edge{
    position:relative;
    height:34px;
    width:100%;
    overflow:hidden;
    line-height:0;
  }
  .mulch-edge svg{display:block;width:100%;height:100%;}
  /* ===== Benefits ===== */
  .benefits{
    background:var(--forest);
    color:#f4efe2;
    padding:50px 20px 60px;
  }
  .benefits-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);
    gap:24px;
    max-width:1180px;
    margin:0 auto;
  }
  .benefit-card{
    text-align:center;
    padding:22px 14px;
  }
  .benefit-card .icon{
    width:54px;height:54px;
    margin:0 auto 14px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--gold);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  }
  .benefit-card .icon svg{width:26px;height:26px;stroke:#2b2008;}
  .benefit-card h3{
    color:#fff;
    font-size:1.05rem;
    margin-bottom:6px;
  }
  .benefit-card p{
    font-size:.9rem;
    color:#d9d2c2;
  }
  /* ===== Section generic ===== */
  section.block{
    padding:64px 20px;
  }
  .section-head{
    text-align:center;
    max-width:680px;
    margin:0 auto 44px;
  }
  .section-head .tag{
    display:inline-block;
    color:var(--gold);
    font-weight:700;
    letter-spacing:3px;
    font-size:.75rem;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .section-head h2{
    font-size:2rem;
    margin-bottom:12px;
  }
  .section-head p{color:var(--muted);}
  /* ===== Services ===== */
  .services-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);
    gap:22px;
    max-width:1180px;
    margin:0 auto;
  }
  .service-card{
    background:#fff;
    border:1px solid #e6dfce;
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    padding:26px 22px;
    transition:box-shadow .2s ease, border-color .2s ease;
  }
  .service-card:hover{
    box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(46,59,36,.1);
    border-color:var(--gold);
  }
  .service-card .icon{
    width:46px;height:46px;
    border-radius:8px;
    background:var(--tan);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    margin-bottom:14px;
  }
  .service-card .icon svg{width:24px;height:24px;stroke:var(--forest);fill:none;}
  .service-card h3{font-size:1.08rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
  .service-card p{font-size:.92rem;color:var(--muted);}
  /* ===== About ===== */
  .about{background:var(--tan);}
  .about-wrap{
    display:flex;
    gap:46px;
    align-items:center;
    max-width:1180px;
    margin:0 auto;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .about-wrap img{
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    flex:1 1 380px;
    box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(46,59,36,.18);
  }
  .about-text{flex:1 1 380px;}
  .about-text .tag{
    display:inline-block;
    color:var(--gold);
    font-weight:700;
    letter-spacing:3px;
    font-size:.75rem;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .about-text h2{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:18px;}
  .about-text p{margin-bottom:16px;color:#3a3327;}
  .about-stats{
    display:flex;
    gap:30px;
    margin-top:24px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .about-stats div{text-align:left;}
  .about-stats strong{
    display:block;
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif;
    font-size:1.7rem;
    color:var(--forest-dark);
  }
  .about-stats span{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--muted);}
  /* ===== Gallery ===== */
  .gallery-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);
    gap:18px;
    max-width:1180px;
    margin:0 auto;
  }
  .gallery-item{
    position:relative;
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    overflow:hidden;
    aspect-ratio:4/3;
    box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(46,59,36,.14);
  }
  .gallery-item img{
    width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;
    transition:transform .35s ease;
  }
  .gallery-item:hover img{transform:scale(1.06);}
  .gallery-cap{
    position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(31,41,23,0),rgba(31,41,23,.85));
    color:#fff;
    padding:30px 16px 12px;
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:.95rem;
  }
  .gallery-cap small{
    display:block;
    font-weight:400;
    font-size:.78rem;
    color:#d9d2c2;
    margin-top:2px;
  }
  /* ===== Testimonials ===== */
  .testimonials{background:var(--forest-dark);color:#f4efe2;}
  .testimonials .section-head h2,
  .testimonials .section-head p{color:#f4efe2;}
  .testimonials .section-head p{color:#cdc6b4;}
  .testi-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
    gap:22px;
    max-width:1180px;
    margin:0 auto;
  }
  .testi-card{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    padding:26px 22px;
  }
  .testi-card .stars{color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:1.05rem;}
  .testi-card p{font-size:.94rem;color:#e7e1d2;margin-bottom:16px;}
  .testi-card strong{display:block;font-size:.92rem;color:#fff;}
  .testi-card span{font-size:.8rem;color:#b9b09c;}
  /* ===== CTA ===== */
  .cta{
    background:var(--gold);
    color:#2b2008;
    text-align:center;
    padding:54px 20px;
  }
  .cta h2{color:#2b2008;font-size:1.9rem;margin-bottom:10px;}
  .cta p{margin-bottom:26px;font-size:1.02rem;}
  .cta .hero-buttons .btn-outline{border-color:#2b2008;color:#2b2008;}
  .cta .hero-buttons .btn-outline:hover{background:#2b2008;color:#fff;}
  .cta .btn-primary{background:var(--forest);color:#fff;}
  .cta .btn-primary:hover{background:var(--forest-dark);}
  /* ===== Contact ===== */
  .contact{background:var(--cream);}
  .contact-wrap{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr;
    gap:40px;
    max-width:1180px;
    margin:0 auto;
  }
  .contact-info h2{font-size:1.9rem;margin-bottom:14px;}
  .contact-info p{color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:24px;}
  .info-row{
    display:flex;
    gap:14px;
    align-items:flex-start;
    margin-bottom:20px;
  }
  .info-row .icon{
    width:42px;height:42px;flex-shrink:0;
    border-radius:8px;
    background:var(--forest);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  }
  .info-row .icon svg{width:20px;height:20px;stroke:#fff;fill:none;}
  .info-row h4{font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:3px;}
  .info-row p, .info-row a{font-size:.92rem;color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;}
  .info-row a.phone-link{color:var(--forest-dark);font-weight:700;font-size:1.15rem;}
  .map-frame{
    margin-top:20px;
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    overflow:hidden;
    border:1px solid #e6dfce;
    box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(46,59,36,.1);
  }
  .map-frame iframe{width:100%;height:260px;border:0;display:block;}
  .quote-form{
    background:#fff;
    border:1px solid #e6dfce;
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    padding:30px;
    box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(46,59,36,.08);
  }
  .quote-form h3{font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:6px;}
  .quote-form > p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:20px;}
  .form-row{margin-bottom:16px;}
  .form-row label{
    display:block;
    font-size:.85rem;
    font-weight:700;
    margin-bottom:6px;
    color:var(--forest-dark);
  }
  .form-row input, .form-row select, .form-row textarea{
    width:100%;
    padding:11px 13px;
    border:1px solid #d8cfb9;
    border-radius:6px;
    font-family:'Karla',sans-serif;
    font-size:.95rem;
    background:var(--cream);
    color:var(--text);
  }
  .form-row input:focus, .form-row select:focus, .form-row textarea:focus{
    outline:2px solid var(--gold);
    outline-offset:1px;
    background:#fff;
  }
  .two-col-row{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
    gap:16px;
  }
  .quote-form button{
    width:100%;
    padding:14px;
    border:none;
    border-radius:6px;
    background:var(--forest);
    color:#fff;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:1rem;
    cursor:pointer;
    transition:background .2s ease;
  }
  .quote-form button:hover{background:var(--gold);color:#2b2008;}
  /* ===== Footer ===== */
  footer{
    background:var(--forest-dark);
    color:#cdc6b4;
    padding:50px 20px 22px;
  }
  .footer-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);
    gap:30px;
    max-width:1180px;
    margin:0 auto 30px;
  }
  .footer-brand{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:12px;
    margin-bottom:14px;
  }
  .footer-brand img{
    width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid var(--gold);
  }
  .footer-brand strong{font-family:'Fraunces',serif;color:#fff;font-size:1.15rem;}
  footer h4{color:#fff;font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:14px;letter-spacing:1px;}
  footer ul{list-style:none;}
  footer li{margin-bottom:9px;font-size:.9rem;}
  footer a{text-decoration:none;color:#cdc6b4;}
  footer a:hover{color:var(--gold);}
  .footer-bottom{
    border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
    max-width:1180px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding-top:20px;
    font-size:.8rem;
    color:#9a9279;
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    gap:10px;
  }
  /* ===== Mobile call bar ===== */
  .mobile-call{
    display:none;
    position:fixed;
    bottom:0;left:0;right:0;
    background:var(--forest);
    color:#fff;
    text-align:center;
    padding:14px;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:1rem;
    text-decoration:none;
    z-index:1100;
    box-shadow:0 -4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.2);
  }
  /* ===== Responsive ===== */
  @media (max-width:900px){
    .benefits-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
    .services-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
    .gallery-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
    .testi-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .contact-wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .about-wrap{flex-direction:column;}
    .footer-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
  }
  @media (max-width:680px){
    nav.main-nav{
      position:absolute;
      top:100%;left:0;right:0;
      background:var(--cream);
      flex-direction:column;
      align-items:flex-start;
      padding:16px 20px 22px;
      gap:14px;
      border-bottom:3px solid var(--bark);
      box-shadow:0 8px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
      display:none;
    }
    nav.main-nav.open{display:flex;}
    .menu-toggle{display:flex;}
    .nav-call{display:none;}
    nav.main-nav .nav-call{display:flex;width:100%;justify-content:center;margin-top:6px;}
    .hero h1{font-size:1.7rem;}
    .hero{padding:70px 16px 90px;}
    .benefits-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .services-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .gallery-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .two-col-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    section.block{padding:48px 16px;}
    body{padding-bottom:58px;}
    .mobile-call{display:block;}
    .footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:26px;}
    .about-stats{justify-content:space-between;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header class="site-header">
  <div class="nav-wrap">
    <a href="#home" class="brand">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Arnold's Mulch logo">
      <span class="brand-text">Arnold's Mulch<span>Muncie, Indiana</span></span>
    </a>
    <button class="menu-toggle" aria-label="Toggle menu" onclick="document.querySelector('.main-nav').classList.toggle('open')">
      <span></span><span></span><span></span>
    </button>
    <nav class="main-nav">
      <a href="#home">Home</a>
      <a href="#services">Services</a>
      <a href="#about">About</a>
      <a href="#gallery">Gallery</a>
      <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
      <a href="tel:7657492256" class="nav-call">
        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 0 1-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 0 1 4.11 2h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72c.13.96.36 1.9.68 2.81a2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 0 0 6 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45c.91.32 1.85.55 2.81.68A2 2 0 0 1 22 16.92z"/></svg>
        (765) 749-2256
      </a>
    </nav>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- ===== HOME / HERO ===== -->
<section id="home" class="hero">
  <div class="hero-eyebrow">Locally Owned &amp; Operated &mdash; Delaware County, Indiana</div>
  <h1>Quality Mulch &amp; Landscaping Services in Muncie, Indiana</h1>
  <p class="lead">Professional mulch installation, landscape maintenance, flower bed design, and property beautification &mdash; done right by a local crew that treats your yard like our own.</p>
  <div class="hero-buttons">
    <a href="tel:7657492256" class="btn btn-primary">Call Now: (765) 749-2256</a>
    <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-outline">Request a Quote</a>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="mulch-edge">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1200 34" preserveAspectRatio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <polygon fill="#2e3b24" points="0,34 1200,34 1200,10 1175,18 1145,6 1110,16 1080,4 1050,14 1020,2 985,15 950,5 915,17 880,3 845,13 810,1 775,16 740,6 705,18 670,2 635,14 600,4 565,16 530,6 495,18 460,2 425,15 390,5 355,17 320,3 285,13 250,1 215,16 180,6 145,18 110,2 75,14 40,4 0,16"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<!-- ===== BENEFITS ===== -->
<section class="benefits">
  <div class="benefits-grid">
    <div class="benefit-card">
      <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 6L9 17l-5-5"/></svg></div>
      <h3>Reliable Service</h3>
      <p>We show up when we say we will and finish the job right &mdash; every time.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="benefit-card">
      <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 1v22M17 5H9.5a3.5 3.5 0 000 7h5a3.5 3.5 0 010 7H6"/></svg></div>
      <h3>Competitive Pricing</h3>
      <p>Fair, honest estimates with no surprise fees &mdash; great value for East Central Indiana.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="benefit-card">
      <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M16 21v-2a4 4 0 00-4-4H6a4 4 0 00-4 4v2M9 11a4 4 0 100-8 4 4 0 000 8zM22 21v-2a4 4 0 00-3-3.87M16 3.13a4 4 0 010 7.75"/></svg></div>
      <h3>Experienced Team</h3>
      <p>Years of hands-on landscaping experience right here in the Muncie area.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="benefit-card">
      <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2l3 7h7l-5.5 4.5L18 21l-6-4.5L6 21l1.5-7.5L2 9h7z"/></svg></div>
      <h3>Quality Materials</h3>
      <p>Premium mulch, stone, and plant materials sourced for lasting curb appeal.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="mulch-edge" style="transform:rotate(180deg)">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1200 34" preserveAspectRatio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <polygon fill="#2e3b24" points="0,34 1200,34 1200,10 1175,18 1145,6 1110,16 1080,4 1050,14 1020,2 985,15 950,5 915,17 880,3 845,13 810,1 775,16 740,6 705,18 670,2 635,14 600,4 565,16 530,6 495,18 460,2 425,15 390,5 355,17 320,3 285,13 250,1 215,16 180,6 145,18 110,2 75,14 40,4 0,16"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<!-- ===== SERVICES ===== -->
<section id="services" class="block">
  <div class="section-head">
    <div class="tag">What We Do</div>
    <h2>Mulch &amp; Landscaping Services</h2>
    <p>From a single mulch delivery to full property landscaping, Arnold's Mulch handles residential and commercial properties throughout Muncie, IN.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="services-grid">

    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 17h13V7H3v10zM16 10h3l2 3v4h-5v-7z" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="6.5" cy="18.5" r="1.5"/><circle cx="17.5" cy="18.5" r="1.5"/></svg></div>
      <h3>Mulch Delivery</h3>
      <p>Bulk mulch delivered straight to your driveway or job site &mdash; great for DIY homeowners and contractors across Delaware County.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2v14M12 16l-4-4M12 16l4-4" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M5 20h14" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>
      <h3>Mulch Installation</h3>
      <p>Clean edges, even coverage, and the right depth &mdash; we deliver and install premium hardwood and dyed mulch so your beds look sharp all season.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 22s7-5.5 7-11a7 7 0 10-14 0c0 5.5 7 11 7 11z" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="12" cy="11" r="2.5" stroke-width="2"/></svg></div>
      <h3>Landscape Bed Design</h3>
      <p>New flower beds and landscape layouts designed around your home's style, sun exposure, and how much upkeep you actually want.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M6 9l9 9M14 4l6 6-4 4M9 14l-5 5M9 14L4 9" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>
      <h3>Shrub &amp; Bush Trimming</h3>
      <p>Routine pruning and shaping to keep shrubs healthy, full, and tidy &mdash; and to keep growth away from siding, walks, and windows.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 12h18M3 6h18M3 18h12" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M17 16l4 2-4 2v-4z" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>
      <h3>Seasonal Cleanup</h3>
      <p>Spring and fall cleanups &mdash; leaf removal, bed clearing, and getting your yard ready for the next season in Indiana's changing weather.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M12 7v5l3 2" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>
      <h3>Property Maintenance</h3>
      <p>Ongoing lawn and landscape care on a schedule that fits your property, so things never get away from you.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="7" cy="15" r="2.2" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="12" cy="11" r="2.6" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="17" cy="16" r="2" stroke-width="2"/><circle cx="11" cy="18" r="1.6" stroke-width="2"/></svg></div>
      <h3>Decorative Stone Installation</h3>
      <p>River rock, boulders, and decorative stone borders for water features, dry creek beds, and low-maintenance accent areas.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="service-card">
      <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 21h18M5 21V8l7-4 7 4v13M9 21v-6h6v6" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>
      <h3>Commercial Landscaping</h3>
      <p>Reliable, professional grounds care for offices, churches, HOAs, and storefronts that keeps your property looking its best year-round.</p>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- ===== ABOUT ===== -->
<section id="about" class="block about">
  <div class="about-wrap">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Backyard landscaping and mulch bed completed by Arnold's Mulch in Muncie, Indiana">
    <div class="about-text">
      <div class="tag">Our Story</div>
      <h2>A Local Crew, A Family Name, A Reputation Built Over Years</h2>
      <p>Arnold's Mulch got its start the way a lot of good things do around here &mdash; with a pickup truck, a trailer, and a handful of neighbors who needed their flower beds cleaned up before summer. Word spread, and what began as weekend mulch deliveries around Muncie grew into a full landscaping operation serving homeowners and businesses across Delaware County.</p>
      <p>We're still a small, hands-on company, and that's by design. Every property gets walked and measured before we ever quote a job. Every mulch bed gets edged clean. Every crew member treats your yard the way they'd treat their own grandmother's place &mdash; because more often than not, they grew up doing exactly that.</p>
      <p>Whether it's a single delivery of mulch for a weekend project, a full landscape bed redesign, or year-round maintenance for a commercial property, our goal is the same: dependable work, fair pricing, and a yard you're proud to come home to.</p>
      <div class="about-stats">
        <div>
          <strong>100%</strong>
          <span>Locally Owned &amp; Operated</span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <strong>Muncie</strong>
          <span>&amp; All of Delaware County</span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <strong>Res. &amp; Comm.</strong>
          <span>Properties of Every Size</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="mulch-edge">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 1200 34" preserveAspectRatio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <polygon fill="#1f2917" points="0,34 1200,34 1200,8 1170,20 1140,4 1110,18 1080,2 1050,16 1020,4 990,18 960,2 930,16 900,4 870,18 840,2 810,16 780,4 750,18 720,2 690,16 660,4 630,18 600,2 570,16 540,4 510,18 480,2 450,16 420,4 390,18 360,2 330,16 300,4 270,18 240,2 210,16 180,4 150,18 120,2 90,16 60,4 30,18 0,2"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<!-- ===== GALLERY ===== -->
<section id="gallery" class="block" style="background:var(--forest-dark);color:#f4efe2;">
  <div class="section-head">
    <div class="tag">Recent Work</div>
    <h2 style="color:#fff;">Landscaping &amp; Mulch Projects Around Muncie</h2>
    <p style="color:#cdc6b4;">A look at some of the mulch installations, flower beds, and landscape upgrades our crew has completed for homeowners in the area.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="gallery-grid">
    <div class="gallery-item">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Front walkway flower bed with fresh mulch and tulips in Muncie, IN">
      <div class="gallery-cap">Front Walkway Flower Bed Refresh<small>New mulch, clean edging, and seasonal blooms</small></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Backyard landscape bed with fresh mulch around mature tree">
      <div class="gallery-cap">Backyard Bed Renovation<small>Fresh mulch installation around mature trees and shrubs</small></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Decorative stone water feature and mulch bed landscaping in Muncie, IN">
      <div class="gallery-cap">Decorative Stone &amp; Water Feature<small>River rock border with mulch bed and new sod</small></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Arnold's Mulch company logo, Muncie, Indiana" style="object-fit:contain;background:#fff;">
      <div class="gallery-cap">Arnold's Mulch<small>Proudly serving Muncie &amp; Delaware County</small></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ===== TESTIMONIALS ===== -->
<section class="block testimonials">
  <div class="section-head">
    <div class="tag">What Neighbors Are Saying</div>
    <h2>Trusted by Homeowners Across Muncie</h2>
    <p>We're proud of the relationships we've built &mdash; here's some of what our customers have told us.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="testi-grid">
    <div class="testi-card">
      <div class="stars">&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;</div>
      <p>"They redid the beds along our front walk and it completely changed the look of the house. The mulch line is so clean, and they hauled away all the old stuff too. Fast, friendly, and the price was very fair."</p>
      <strong>Carol H.</strong>
      <span>Muncie, IN</span>
    </div>
    <div class="testi-card">
      <div class="stars">&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;</div>
      <p>"We've had Arnold's out twice now for mulch delivery and bed cleanup. Both times they were on time, worked hard, and didn't try to upsell us on stuff we didn't need. That kind of honesty is hard to find."</p>
      <strong>Mike &amp; Donna R.</strong>
      <span>Yorktown, IN</span>
    </div>
    <div class="testi-card">
      <div class="stars">&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;</div>
      <p>"Our office building needed a full landscape refresh and they handled everything &mdash; trimming, mulch, new stone border around the sign. Looks great and we've gotten compliments from clients ever since."</p>
      <strong>Brad T.</strong>
      <span>Property Manager, Muncie, IN</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ===== CTA ===== -->
<section class="cta">
  <h2>Ready for a Yard You're Proud Of?</h2>
  <p>Call today or send us a quick message &mdash; we'll get back to you fast with honest pricing.</p>
  <div class="hero-buttons">
    <a href="tel:7657492256" class="btn btn-primary">Call (765) 749-2256</a>
    <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-outline">Request a Free Quote</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ===== CONTACT ===== -->
<section id="contact" class="block contact">
  <div class="section-head">
    <div class="tag">Get In Touch</div>
    <h2>Contact Arnold's Mulch</h2>
    <p>Serving Muncie, Yorktown, Daleville, Albany, and the rest of Delaware County, Indiana.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="contact-wrap">
    <div class="contact-info">
      <div class="info-row">
        <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 0 1-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 0 1 4.11 2h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72c.13.96.36 1.9.68 2.81a2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 0 0 6 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45c.91.32 1.85.55 2.81.68A2 2 0 0 1 22 16.92z" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>
        <div>
          <h4>Call Us</h4>
          <a class="phone-link" href="tel:7657492256">(765) 749-2256</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="info-row">
        <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M21 10c0 7-9 12-9 12s-9-5-9-12a9 9 0 0118 0z" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3" stroke-width="2"/></svg></div>
        <div>
          <h4>Address</h4>
          <p>4605 N Old State Rd 3<br>Muncie, IN 47303</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="info-row">
        <div class="icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M12 7v5l3 2" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></div>
        <div>
          <h4>Hours</h4>
          <p>Monday &ndash; Saturday: 8:30 AM &ndash; 5:00 PM<br>Sunday: Closed</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="map-frame">
        <iframe loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"
          src="https://www.google.com/maps?q=4605+N+Old+State+Rd+3,+Muncie,+IN+47303&output=embed"
          title="Arnold's Mulch location map"></iframe>
      </div>
    </div>

    <form class="quote-form" onsubmit="return sendQuote(event)">
      <h3>Request a Free Quote</h3>
      <p>Tell us a little about your project and we'll get back to you with pricing.</p>
      <div class="two-col-row">
        <div class="form-row">
          <label for="name">Name</label>
          <input type="text" id="name" name="name" required placeholder="Your name">
        </div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <label for="phone">Phone</label>
          <input type="tel" id="phone" name="phone" required placeholder="(765) 555-0123">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <label for="email">Email</label>
        <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="you@example.com">
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <label for="service">Service Needed</label>
        <select id="service" name="service">
          <option>Mulch Delivery</option>
          <option>Mulch Installation</option>
          <option>Landscape Bed Design</option>
          <option>Shrub &amp; Bush Trimming</option>
          <option>Seasonal Cleanup</option>
          <option>Property Maintenance</option>
          <option>Decorative Stone Installation</option>
          <option>Commercial Landscaping</option>
          <option>Other / Not Sure</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <label for="address">Property Address</label>
        <input type="text" id="address" name="address" placeholder="Street address, city">
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <label for="details">Project Details</label>
        <textarea id="details" name="details" rows="4" placeholder="Tell us about your project, approximate yard size, etc."></textarea>
      </div>
      <button type="submit">Send Quote Request</button>
    </form>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ===== FOOTER ===== -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-grid">
    <div>
      <div class="footer-brand">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Arnold's Mulch logo">
        <strong>Arnold's Mulch</strong>
      </div>
      <p>Family-owned mulch and landscaping services serving Muncie, Indiana and the surrounding Delaware County area.</p>
    </div>
    <div>
      <h4>Quick Links</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="#home">Home</a></li>
        <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
        <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
        <li><a href="#gallery">Gallery</a></li>
        <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div>
      <h4>Services</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="#services">Mulch Delivery</a></li>
        <li><a href="#services">Mulch Installation</a></li>
        <li><a href="#services">Landscape Bed Design</a></li>
        <li><a href="#services">Seasonal Cleanup</a></li>
        <li><a href="#services">Commercial Landscaping</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div>
      <h4>Contact</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="tel:7657492256">(765) 749-2256</a></li>
        <li>4605 N Old State Rd 3</li>
        <li>Muncie, IN 47303</li>
        <li>Mon&ndash;Sat: 8:30 AM &ndash; 5:00 PM</li>
        <li>Sunday: Closed</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-bottom">
    <span>&copy; 2026 Arnold's Mulch. All rights reserved.</span>
    <span>Mulch &amp; Landscaping Services &mdash; Muncie, Indiana &amp; Delaware County</span>
  </div>
</footer>

<a href="tel:7657492256" class="mobile-call">Call Arnold's Mulch &mdash; (765) 749-2256</a>

<script>
function sendQuote(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  var f = e.target;
  var subject = encodeURIComponent("Quote Request - " + f.service.value);
  var body = encodeURIComponent(
    "Name: " + f.name.value +
    "\nPhone: " + f.phone.value +
    "\nEmail: " + f.email.value +
    "\nService: " + f.service.value +
    "\nAddress: " + f.address.value +
    "\nDetails: " + f.details.value
  );
  window.location.href = "mailto:info@arnoldsmulch.com?subject=" + subject + "&body=" + body;
  return false;
}
</script>

</body>
</html>
